tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: Using the provided figure, determine what the figure is mainly illustrating.

dialogs.thought: First orient to the figure type and axes to infer the clinical message.

content.content: A black-and-white Kaplan–Meier style survival plot. Y-axis is cumulative survival (%) and x-axis is survival (months) up to about 120. Multiple stepwise curves are shown with a legend titled 'Tumour response' including categories such as no assessment, decrease, increase, and static.

dialogs.thought: Extract legend/axis text to confirm what stratification is being used.

arguments.attribute: legend categories and what the curves represent

dialogs.thought: Verify the legend region to ensure the curves are stratified by tumour response categories.

content.content: The region shows the plot legend titled 'Tumour response' with line-style keys for groups: 'No assessment', 'Decrease', 'Increase', and 'Static', indicating separate survival curves for each response category.

dialogs.content: The main focus of the figure is to show the survival of patients with liver cancer based on their response to the first treatment with TACE, as assessed by CT scans taken 6-8 weeks following the procedure.

whitelist: The main focus of the figure is to show the survival of patients with liver cancer based on their response to the first treatment with TACE, as assessed by CT scans taken 6-8 weeks following the procedure.
